entry_Achievements.name: Welcome to Waffle Island
entry_Achievements.description: Ship your first item for at least 1G.
entry_Achievements.tips: Pick a forageable herb from Praline Forest on Day 1 and drop it in the shipping bin.

entry_Achievements.name: Green Thumb
entry_Achievements.tips: Turnips are the fastest Spring crop (5 days). Buy seeds from Souffle Farm on your first morning.

entry_Achievements.name: First Cast
entry_Achievements.tips: Pick up the free rod from Toby and fish at any water source.

entry_Achievements.name: Half a Quilt
entry_Achievements.description: Ship 1,000G to trigger the Mayor's visit, then ship another 1,000G for the left half of the quilt.
entry_Achievements.tips: Floor 19 of Ganache Mine holds large mushroom clusters that quickly meet the requirement.

entry_Achievements.name: The Whole Quilt
entry_Achievements.description: Upgrade house to Level 2 and complete the Gill → Dale → Mayor → Clock Tower chain.
entry_Achievements.tips: Commission the house upgrade immediately after speaking with Gill.

entry_Achievements.name: First Rainbow on Time
entry_Achievements.description: Complete Daren's Rainbow before the end of Spring Year 1.
entry_Achievements.tips: The Apple and Grilled Yam must be purchased at the Spring or Summer Market.

entry_Achievements.name: The First Rainbow
entry_Achievements.tips: This unlocks early island travel and starts the larger rainbow questline.

entry_Achievements.name: Rock Bottom
entry_Achievements.tips: Use pitfall cracks on upper floors to descend quickly.

entry_Achievements.name: Deeper Still
entry_Achievements.description: Reach Floor 50 of Mt. Gelato Mine.
entry_Achievements.tips: Crystal clusters appear on Floors 38–48.

entry_Achievements.name: Something in the Air
entry_Achievements.description: Trigger your first romantic heart event.
entry_Achievements.tips: Visit your chosen partner early in the morning on their day off.

entry_Achievements.name: I Do
entry_Achievements.tips: Requires the Blue Feather, 8 hearts, and all romantic heart events.

entry_Achievements.name: Bundle of Joy
entry_Achievements.tips: Occurs automatically after the marriage timeline progresses.

entry_Achievements.name: The Hard Years
entry_Achievements.description: Witness all stages of your child's growth.
entry_Achievements.tips: Each growth phase lasts roughly one season.

entry_Achievements.name: Islands Beyond
entry_Achievements.tips: Each rainbow unlocks new regions and story progression.

entry_Achievements.name: Perfect First Year
entry_Achievements.description: Finish all rainbows, marry, obtain all Power Berries, and raise one 10-heart animal in Year 1.
entry_Achievements.tips: Requires aggressive optimization of crops, mining, and relationships.

entry_Achievements.name: Return of the Goddess
entry_Achievements.description: Complete the Goddess Quest by planting the Seedling of Hope and accumulating 50 villager hearts.
entry_Achievements.tips: After the final rainbow, climb Mt. Gelato to trigger the ending.

entry_Achievements.name: A New Dawn
entry_Achievements.description: Complete the Journey Rucksack and send your child to New Game+.
entry_Achievements.tips: Sell livestock before sending the rucksack; animals do not transfer.

entry_Achievements.name: Complete Angler
entry_Achievements.tips: Track rare conditions such as storms and time-of-day catches.

entry_Achievements.name: The Big One
entry_Achievements.tips: Usually found in the deep mine lake or Goddess Cave.

entry_Achievements.name: Storm Chaser
entry_Achievements.tips: Only appears in the river during typhoons or blizzards.

entry_Achievements.name: Crack of Dawn
entry_Achievements.tips: Available early morning at Toucan Island or the Goddess Cave.

entry_Achievements.name: Keeper of the Spring
entry_Achievements.tips: Night fishing at the Goddess Spring.

entry_Achievements.name: Diamond in the Rough
entry_Achievements.description: Refine a Diamond from a 3-sparkle White Wonderful.
entry_Achievements.tips: Diamonds appear in deeper mine floors.

entry_Achievements.name: The Geologist
entry_Achievements.description: Collect and refine every gem and metal type.
entry_Achievements.tips: Late mine floors contain the rare materials.

entry_Achievements.name: Once in a Lifetime
entry_Achievements.description: Find the Shining Baumkuchen on Floor 50 of Mt. Gelato Mine.
entry_Achievements.tips: There is only one per save file.

entry_Achievements.name: Four Seasons
entry_Achievements.description: Harvest at least one crop in each season within a single year.
entry_Achievements.tips: Buckwheat grows during Winter.

entry_Achievements.name: Full Bloom
entry_Achievements.tips: Some flower seeds are festival-exclusive.

entry_Achievements.name: Every Crop
entry_Achievements.description: Grow every crop type including trees.
entry_Achievements.tips: Track via the crop bookshelf.

entry_Achievements.name: Shining Harvest
entry_Achievements.description: Ship Shining quality versions of 10 crops.
entry_Achievements.tips: Use Happy Fertilizer regularly.

entry_Achievements.name: Old MacDonald
entry_Achievements.description: Own at least one of every livestock type.
entry_Achievements.tips: Some animals unlock with ranch reputation.

entry_Achievements.name: Ten out of Ten
entry_Achievements.tips: Daily brushing and feeding increases affection.

entry_Achievements.name: Silk Empire
entry_Achievements.tips: Requires a Level 2 Coop.

entry_Achievements.name: Golden Fleece
entry_Achievements.tips: Requires a 10-heart sheep.

entry_Achievements.name: One Big Family
entry_Achievements.tips: Requires the Level 5 house.

entry_Achievements.name: Unlikely Friends
entry_Achievements.tips: Give honey repeatedly to raise friendship.

entry_Achievements.name: Master of the Kitchen
entry_Achievements.description: Cook every recipe in the game.
entry_Achievements.tips: Requires every utensil and several special ingredients.

entry_Achievements.name: Island Naturalist
entry_Achievements.tips: Items often hide near foliage edges.

entry_Achievements.name: Honey Spectrum
entry_Achievements.description: Collect honey of four flower colors.
entry_Achievements.tips: Different flowers produce different honey.

entry_Achievements.name: Waffle Island Tycoon
entry_Achievements.tips: Silk yarn and crop processing produce high profits.

entry_Achievements.name: Perfect Town
entry_Achievements.description: Raise all villagers to at least 6 hearts.
entry_Achievements.tips: Part-time jobs raise friendship quickly.

entry_Achievements.name: Master Craftsman
entry_Achievements.tips: Mining your own metals greatly reduces upgrade cost.
